components.comment: Matches any URL with a fragment that equals no_universal_links and instructs the system not to open it as a universal link.
Matches any URL whose path starts with / and that has a query item with name 'action' and a value of smartbuy
Matches any URL whose path starts with /hotels/ and that has a query item with name 'referrer' and a value of smartbuy
Matches any URL whose path starts with /hotels/hotel-review/ and that has a query item with name 'quoteId' and a value of *
Matches any URL whose path starts with /hotels/approval/ and that has a query item with name 'quoteId' and a value of *
